app.name: Time Mapper
timeline.empty.title: No entries yet. Add a place to start tracking automatically.
timeline.emptyNoPlaces.title: Add a place to start tracking
timeline.emptyNoPlaces.body: Pick a place you visit often. Time Mapper logs the rest automatically.
timeline.emptyTrackedReady.title: You're set up.
timeline.emptyTrackedReady.body: Visits to your places will appear here automatically.
stats.title: This week
settings.title: Settings
onboarding.welcome.title: Time Mapper
onboarding.welcome.body: Private, automatic time tracking for the places that matter.
onboarding.permissions.title: Always location
onboarding.permissions.body: Time Mapper watches for entry and exit of your places in the background. Your location stays on your device — nothing is ever uploaded.
onboarding.firstPlace.title: Your first place
onboarding.firstPlace.body: Add one place — home, the office, your gym — and Time Mapper will log your visits automatically.
notifier.opened.title: Started tracking
notifier.closed.title: Stopped tracking
notifier.consolidated.title: {{count}} transitions
tracking.banner.foregroundOnly: Auto-tracking is paused. Enable Always location in Settings.
tracking.banner.denied: Auto-tracking is off. Turn on location access in Settings.
tracking.placeLimit.title: Limit reached
tracking.placeLimit.body: Time Mapper currently supports up to 20 tracked places. Remove one to add another.
